positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is visible in the UI
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh)
Verify the user remains logged in and is NOT redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard content is still visible
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verify session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is case-insensitive for the email field and the user is successfully authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' (uppercase version of the valid email) in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully authenticated
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login using email address with mixed case characters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: After a failed attempt, the user can re-enter correct credentials and log in successfully
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter an incorrect password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g. 'Invalid credentials')
Clear the password field
Enter the correct valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully authenticated
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login after a previously failed login attempt

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User can log out and successfully log back in with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or link
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field again
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully authenticated and the dashboard is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout and re-login with valid credentials

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password field masks all entered characters and login is still successful
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify that the password characters are masked (displayed as dots or asterisks)
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully authenticated
positive_scenarios.title: Password field masks the entered characters

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is shown for the empty email/username field
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field completely empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Email is required' or 'Username is required'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username/email field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is shown for the empty password field
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Password is required'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and validation error messages are shown for both empty fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field completely empty
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify validation error messages are displayed for both fields
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with both username and password fields empty

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and a generic invalid credentials error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect username or password'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is shown without revealing whether the email exists
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistent_user_99999@fakdomain.com' in the email/username field
Enter 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with an unregistered / non-existent email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and an email format validation error is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail@@domain..com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Please enter a valid email address'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application is not vulnerable to SQL injection; login is rejected and no unauthorized access is granted
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter the SQL injection string ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the email/username field
Enter 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or redirected to the dashboard
Verify the application handles the input safely and displays an error message or validation message
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in the username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented; whitespace-only inputs are treated as empty and validation errors are displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter only spaces '     ' in the email/username field
Enter only spaces '     ' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate validation error message is displayed indicating the fields cannot be blank or whitespace
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with whitespace-only values in both fields
